sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: Category 11 (seasonal atmosphere). Preferred sources Unsplash → Pexels → generative-leonardo fallback. Generative is ALLOWED as fallback on this slot per the brief. Two unblock paths exist: (1) source from Unsplash/Pexels once access is open, (2) produce generative-Leonardo variants per the style-direction document. I am not running a generative batch in this session because the editor has not approved the generative style framework pass for Escape yet, and doing so without that approval would violate the workflow's editorial-control-first rule.
sourcingNotes.blocker: Same anti-bot blocker for the sourced path. The generative path is unblocked technically but requires a signed-off style brief and prompt-set approval from the editor before variants are generated.
recommendedUnblockPath: Option A (sourced): Same as eat-hub-hero-01 — Unsplash/Pexels access unblock.

Option B (generative): Editor approves the generative style framework for Escape (sibling doc `peninsula-insider-generative-image-style-2026-04-09.md`), then sourcing agent runs a 6-variant Phoenix batch and logs to `generative-log/escape-hub-hero-01.jsonl`. Variants are shortlisted, not auto-approved.

generativeMetadata.batchStatusReason: Awaiting editor sign-off on generative style framework for Escape surface.

editorActionsRequested.question: Authorise a 6-variant Leonardo Phoenix generative batch for escape-hub-hero-01 using the style framework document? Or keep the slot in sourced-only mode and wait for Unsplash/Pexels access?
editorActionsRequested.defaultIfNoReply: No generative batch runs without explicit approval.
